name: Transylvania Drift
short_description: Transylvania Drift is a unique drifting game which takes place in the beautiful region of Transylvania! Take on your opponents with the most iconic cars and show them who owns the Transylvanian roads!
detailed_description:
Welcome to Transylvania!

The Land of Legends!

Here, let me introduce you to this game's features:

Parking Drift Map

  • "Parking Drift" is a free-roam map in which you can do whatever your soul wants too(well not everything but you can still mess around, drift, try flipping the car over or just figure out the maps interesting layout). The map is based on a real life location, with all kinds of details and little easter eggs which you might understand if you look around for a little bit.

Gutin Pass/Pasul Gutâi Maramureș Drift Map

  • Gutin Pass/Pasul Gutâi is a real life road located in a beautiful state of Maramures. The map itself is an one-to-one scale map approximately 12km/7.5 miles so it might take you some time to cross it because it's a really long curvy road. You have 4 options with this map, sunrise mode downhill upwill or night mode uphill/downhill in which you race against a randomly selected car to make things more interesting for you!

Airport Speedway Map Race Track

  • The Airport Speedway Map is inspired from the real Satu Mare International Airport, it's not the best map you will ever see but it's a map and a race track aswell. Just like in the previous map, you race against a randomly selected car. ;)

Car Selection

  • You get to choose between iconic and unique vehicles, starting from sedans, hatchbacks, wagons and more.. Some of them which are really popular in Eastern Europe, you will see what I mean by that if you are familiar with the zone itself.

Easy to Use Drift Mechanics

  • Drifting in Transylvania Drift is for everyone! And it isn't complicated at all, you just go on the road and whenever you want to steer the car goes sideways, and that's it, no need to use the handbrake or to shift gears, the car already knows it's mission. Of course the game has clutch and handbrake buttons if that's really needed but I don't think you need to use those but just in case those are there for you to use.

Multiple Camera Modes

  • The game has multiple camera modes, two 3rd person cameras, one cockpilot camera and one orbit camera which basically let's you spin the camera around the car while drifting so you can see the action better and to have a better view of the car!

Of course in time I will update my game with more features, more maps and of course more cars and I'm looking forward seeing what you mates think about the game.

Thank you for taking your time reading the game's description! Lots of health to you!
